title: The Golden Bell Becomes the Goal
description: The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 16, 17, this scene centers on Eneru, Enel, Luffy, Aisa, Nami. The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: that lightning is ineffective on him!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Only natural enemy in this world!

summary: The fight shifts toward the great golden bell, turning victory into a promise to prove that the City of Gold exists.
